label: Palestinos Muertos (Gaza)
source: Gaza Ministry of Health / UN OCHA
contestNote: Israel disputes figures, argues Hamas fighters counted as civilians. Plus ~14,200 missing/presumed dead = ~76,100+ total

label: Palestinos Heridos (Gaza)
contestNote: Figures may undercount due to overwhelmed health system

label: Palestinos Desplazados
contestNote: ~90% of Gaza's 2.1M population displaced at peak

label: Rehenes Restantes en Gaza
source: Hostages and Missing Families Forum / IDF
contestNote: All 251 hostages accounted for by Jan 26, 2026: ~105 released Nov 2023 truce, 33 in Phase 1 (Jan 2025), 20 alive + 28 bodies in Oct 2025 deal, remainder died in captivity or rescued

label: Soldados de las FDI Muertos (Total de la Guerra)
Estructuras Destruidas/Dañadas en Gaza
contestNote: By late 2024, est. 60% of all structures damaged or destroyed

label: Camiones de Ayuda Entrando a Gaza (prom. diario)
contestNote: Rafah crossing reopened Mar 21, 2026 for first time since Israel-Iran war escalation; land aid via Israel remains zero; 2026 Flash Appeal $4.1B — only 7.2% funded

label: Instalaciones de Salud Dañadas/Destruidas
contestNote: All 36 hospitals in Gaza damaged or destroyed; ~16 partially functional at peak

label: Población en Riesgo de Fase 5 de la CIF (Catástrofe)
contestNote: Israel disputes famine characterization; 2026 humanitarian Flash Appeal $4.1B required, only 7.2% funded as of Mar 2026

label: Estimación del Costo de Reconstrucción de Gaza
